title: 22:20 ГўВҖВ” September 1, 2022
body_text:
22:20 ГўВҖВ” September 1, 2022
Update to FX Notes Plus ГўВҖВ“ FedEx Account Number
You no longer need to provide EBCГўВҖВҷs account number when ordering FedEx pickup. We updated the FX Notes Plus Part to reflect this change.
Currency Volume
FX Notes Plus Part
Section 11.4, Shipping Foreign Cheques
We removed EBCГўВҖВҷs FedEx account number. You just need to say that you have a prepaid label and everything is in the receiverГўВҖВҷs name (i.e.,В EBC).
Section 13.2, Processing Foreign Currency for Shipment
Same change as above.
